name: Gitennes Exploration Inc.
summary: Gitennes Exploration Inc., a junior mineral exploration company, explores for mineral deposits in Peru and Canada. The company explores for gold and silver properties. It holds an option to acquire a 100% interest in the Snowbird gold exploration property in British Columbia; and a royalty interest in the Urumalqui silver project in Peru. The company also has an option to acquire three gold properties and a polymetallic property in the Val-d'Or region. Gitennes Exploration Inc. is based in Vancouver, Canada.
